applyTo: "**"

Follow root `AGENTS.md` as the canonical AI-agent workflow.

Do not bulk-load `.ai-agent/` files by default. Use the routing table in `AGENTS.md` and `.ai-agent/routing-manifest.json` to choose only the relevant instruction packs.

Do not merge PRs, publish packages, relax safety defaults, invent Pi APIs, or bypass review gates unless the owner explicitly instructs you and the relevant routed files allow it.
